specs.title: cp-000: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift- toggles subscript

cp-005: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-R dispatches scholarsynceditor-action with
cp-006: Academic keyboard shortcut Mod-Shift-Enter inserts a horizontal rule
cp-007: Academic keyboard shortcuts Mod-Shift-1 through Mod-Shift-4 toggle heading level
cp-008: Studio TiptapEditor supports heading levels 1 through 6
cp-009: Studio TiptapEditor placeholder text is Start typing or press for AI commands
cp-010: Studio TiptapEditor uses Tableconfigure resizable true
cp-011: Studio TiptapEditor allows base64 image insertion through Imageconfigure allowBa
cp-012: Studio TiptapEditor enables autolink and link-on-paste behavior through the Link
cp-013: Studio TiptapEditor enables nested task items
cp-014: Studio TiptapEditor mounts the same custom SlashCommandsExtension OutlinePlugin
cp-015: Neither AcademicEditor nor Studio TiptapEditor registers a custom math node or m
cp-016: Neither AcademicEditor nor Studio TiptapEditor registers a track-changes extensi
cp-017: Footnote nodes are inline atomic nodes and cannot be edited directly in the docu
cp-018: New footnote ids are generated in the form fn_timestamp_random
cp-019: New footnote numbers are assigned as existing footnote count plus one
cp-020: Removing a footnote command deletes the matching node by id
cp-021: Footnote renumbering runs in a ProseMirror plugin appendTransaction
cp-022: Footnote renumbering updates every footnote node whose stored number no longer m
cp-023: Footnote marker HTML renders as a sup containing the footnote number
cp-024: Hovering a footnote marker waits 300 ms before showing the tooltip editor
cp-025: Footnote tooltip title reads Footnote number
cp-026: Footnote tooltip textarea saves on blur rather than on every keystroke
cp-027: Footnote tooltip delete button title is Remove footnote
cp-028: FootnoteSection does not render at all when the editor has zero footnotes
cp-029: FootnoteSection heading label is exactly Footnotes
cp-030: FootnoteSection sorts footnotes by numeric order before rendering
cp-031: Clicking a footnote row in FootnoteSection focuses the editor and moves selectio
cp-032: Outline plugin rebuilds the outline on every heading change with a 100 ms deboun
cp-033: Outline plugin still rebuilds section word counts on non-heading content changes
cp-034: Citation nodes are inline atomic nodes with referenceIds defaulting to an empty
